figures.caption: Table 2: Feature taxonomy across layers. The final encoder (block 23) has the richest semantic coverage; the mid-encoder (block 11) concentrates change-detection features. Counts below 10 omitted.

Figure 1: Progressive ablation curves across three encoder layers. CRPS is measured as features are cumulatively removed in order of decreasing decoder-norm contribution. Early and mid-encoder layers degrade sharply, while the final encoder remains flat or improves.
